name: IDILI
short_description: Explore the Archaeological Park in Sardinia in search of Ellie, your girlfriend who vanished after her work shift. Uncover the dark connection between Lithus Corporation and Ellie’s fate and stay silent: something is hunting you.
detailed_description:
DISCLAIMER

IDILI is a 0.1. Dev Build (Alpha prototype) that's still under development and does not represent the final quality of the game. We will continuously work to improve it and update with new content.

THE STORY

John accompanies Ellie to Sardinia for her temporary assignment at the Isili Archaeological Park, working for Lithus Corporation.

During the summer solstice, she and a colleague are sent on a special mission, but they never return. Worried, John enters the park alone. Darkness closes in. Something moves in the shadows. To survive, he must remain silent as a creature drawn to sound searches for its prey.

To find Ellie, he must face his fears and uncover the secrets linking her disappearance to Lithus’s hidden origins.

DIEGETIC GAMEPLAY

Experience full immersion with diegetic gameplay. Manage the Backpack Inventory, use the Park Map, and conserve power from the essential Flashlight Battery System.

AI FREE-ROAMING MONSTER

Evade a predator driven by a free-roaming AI. Utilizing a Stimuli Detection system based on sight, sound, and flashlight use, the monster features an Adaptive AI Behaviour that evolves its hunting tactics based on your actions.

REAL-LIFE INSPIRED

IDILI aims to bring the evocative landscape of Sardinia to life. The Archeologic Park of Is Paras, in Isili, Sardinia, Italy is inspired by a real place in the village of Isili in the heart of south Sardinia (you can visit it, for real!).

Every asset in the game, from the map to the smallest detail, is completely original, except for some vegetation.

We take pride in recreating the archaeological sites and cultural landmarks as faithfully as possible, bringing the real-world locations to life in the game.

IMMERSIVE VISUALS AND SOUND DESIGN

Experience life-like graphics enhanced by Lumen and cutting-edge technical improvements. New immersive soundscapes (including MetaSounds) and dynamic/adaptive composition heighten the eerie atmosphere and transport you straight into the horror.

THE TEAM

Megalith Interactive Studios is a new studio that was founded in 2024. We are passionate, independent and zero budget. IDILI is the result of a common effort and with it we want to show our skills and try to enter the world of video games with a project that comes out in Early Access to help us validate the game.

supported_languages:
English*, Italian
*languages with full audio support
